title: RichText field / dynamic fields
excerpt: I’m loving the ability to use dynamic fields in a WorkDoc - we can easily generate PDFs containing data from the pulse on the board. Great. However the Long text field type loses line breaks when shown on the WorkDoc and…

posts.author: tcmarimosa (Tom Crawley)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m loving the ability to use dynamic fields in a WorkDoc - we can easily generate PDFs containing data from the pulse on the board. Great. However the Long text field type loses line breaks when shown on the WorkDoc and therefore the PDF export. Ideally it would be great to have a RichText column type that we have put on our WorkForms and have that content pulled through to the WorkDoc and PDF export.
